rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong developer-tooling/IDE background but lacking the required deep Java/Kotlin/JVM and enterprise-framework (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) expertise. The wording differs but the strengths and concerns are equivalent, and neither evaluation references the career gap, its duration, or any age/recency inference tied to the changed dates. The differences are ordinary reword-level noise, not a response to the demographic signal.
